name: Runemaker’s Desk
description: This wooden desk allows the (attuned) user to cast Rune I (Rune Mastery) once each day. Rune I is an Essence spell, so the Daily and Embed spells used come from the Essence Embedding list.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Daily III (10), Embed III (7), Rune I (3). Days: 24. Standard cost = 288sp, plus the cost of the desk itself. Level 10 item.

name: Staff of Fasting
description: This walking staff allows its (attuned) bearer to cast Sustain Self (Creations) on a daily basis. Sustain Self is a Channeling spell, so the Daily and Embed spells used come from the Other Realm Embedding list. The staff itself will cost less than a silver piece if made from any non-magical wood, so we can ignore that expense.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Daily II (9), Embed II (6), Sustain Self (2). Days: 21. Standard cost = 231sp. Level 9 item.

name: Reefwarder’s Eyes
description: This beaded leather headband (2sp) permits the wearer to see 100' into water as if it was air. It is used to avoid rocks and reefs while approaching unfamiliar shores.
recipe: Work Mundane Leather (3), Constant X (35), Embed VII (15), Watervision (Physical Enhancement, 7). Days: 60. Standard cost 2282sp. Level 35 item.

name: Staff of Levitation
description: This white wooden staff is carved with inscriptions regarding centering oneself and achieving a sense of lightness (with a base value of 2sp). It permits casting Levitation I (from the Movement spell list), using the wielder’s Mentalism PP (if any) or the 3 PP stored in the item.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Emplace Spell III (5), Levitation I (3), Implant Power I (4). Days: 16. Standard cost = 114sp. Level 5 item.

name: Climber’s Gloves
description: These fine leather gloves fit securely and have an exceptional grip, granting +10 to all Climbing maneuvers.
recipe: Work Mundane Leather (3), General II (10). Days: 13. Standard cost = 156sp. Level 10 item.

name: Golden Ring
description: This gold ring (75 sp value) is a +2 Spell Adder for the Realm of Essence.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Spell Adder II (9 x 2 for wearable). Days: 23. Standard cost = 328sp. Level 9 item.

name: Vestments of Divinity
description: These elaborate robes (3 sp value) act as a x1.5 PP Multiplier for users of Channeling.
recipe: Work Mundane Cloth (2), Power Multiplier II (12 x 2 for wearable). Days: 26. Standard cost = 367sp. Level 12 item.

name: Headband of Meditation
description: This fine silk headband (worth 2sp) helps the wearer separate themself from the distractions of the everyday world, granting them a +60 skill bonus in Meditation, plus a +5 Meditation Knack. Even a wearer with Meditation skill rank bonus of +60 or more may benefit from the Knack if they do not already have a Knack in Meditation.
recipe: Work Mundane Cloth (2), Internal Skill III (15), Knack (12). Days: 29. Standard cost = 495sp. Level 15 item.

name: Prayer Beads of Patience
description: This string of large wooden beads is intended to help the user slow down and accept that not all things happen immediately, a lesson with which Alchemists are extremely familiar. It increases the user’s Self-Discipline stat bonus by 2.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Stat Bonus II (19). Days: 23. Standard cost = 483sp. Level 19 item.

name: Adamantine Helm
description: A heavy helm of adamant steel (3015sp) set with rubies (500sp), this beautiful head protection negates 75% of all head criticals, while having no maneuver or perception penalty. It is “indestructible” and fits any Medium head.
recipe: Work Metal V (35), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), Crit Negation True (90), Unbreakable Work (90), Armor III (14), Armor II (9). Days: 221. Standard cost: 25,173sp. Level 90 item.

name: Adamantine Shield
description: This is a full shield of adamant steel (+25 Shield skill, base price of 3,007sp), with the Autofocusing, Mobility, Resilience, and Weapon Bane abilities (see the Armor Enchantment list).
recipe: Work Metal V (35), Weapon Bane (19), Autofocusing (16), Resilience (15), Mobility (11). Days: 71. Standard cost: 5,776sp. Level 35 item.

name: Air Drake Armor
description: This is a full set of armor created from the hide of an old air drake (AT 8, 460sp). In addition to the advantages of dragonskin armor, it provides various magical abilities. The wearer can cast Fly III (Lofty Bridge) in combination with Extension IV (Spell Enhancement) once a day (duration 44 minutes). Twice per day, the wearer can cast Lightning Bolt I (Light Law). Finally, the armor provides a constant Lightarmor (Elemental Shields).
recipe: Work Organic True (20), Daily XX (40), Embed XX (30), Embed X (19), Fly III (11), Extension IV (9). Daily XX (40), Embed X (19), Lightning Bolt I (10), Constant X (35), Embed X (19), Lightarmor (8). Days: 260. Standard cost: 12,940sp. Level 40 item.

name: Armor of Golspre
description: This beautifully ornate High Steel plate armor (AT 10, base 165sp) with inlaid gold designs (increasing the base value to 700sp) has been enchanted to +30. It has also had its armor penalties reduced to -40 to maneuvers and -20 to missiles with no Perception penalty. The helmet provides constant Watervision (Physical Enhancement), The vambraces provide Waterlungs (Physical Enhancement) that trigger whenever the wearer’s head is underwater and cancels when above water. The greaves provide constant Underwater Movement (Movement Mastery). When the whole suit is present, it will size itself to any Medium humanoid, and wearing the entire suit provides constant Lightarmor, Heatarmor, and Coldarmor (Elemental Shields). Enchanted suit includes all padding and underarmor.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Armor II (9), Armor III (14), Watervision (7), Embed VII (15), Constant X (35). Days: 79. Standard price: 3,081sp (not including the base item price). Penalties eliminated. Vambraces: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Armor II (9), Armor II (9), Waterlungs (8), Embed X (19), Constant X (35 x 2 triggered = 70). Days: 114. Standard price 4,560sp (not including the base item price). Penalties reduced to -5 maneuvers and -20 missiles.

name: Armor of Slickness
description: This rigid leather armor (AT 6) is a complete set except for helmet. At need, it becomes slippery, adding +15 to Contortion maneuvers and reducing Grappling attacks by two Sizes. It also provides +10 to DB. It fits any Medium humanoid.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Automatic Sizing Organic (6), General III (15), Armor II (9), Defensive Size II (35 x 1/5 for single type = 7). Days: 43. Standard cost: 1,668sp. Level 35 item.

name: Armor of the Rangers
description: This set of +15 rigid leather armor (AT 6) includes everything but a helm. In addition to the defensive bonus, the body armor provides a +10 bonus to Stalking maneuvers and Survival maneuvers. The vambraces have been enchanted to reduce the missile penalty to -10, while the maneuver penalty of the greaves has been reduced to -5. The entire set functions as a +3 Spell Adder for Rangers.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Armor II (9). Days: 15. Standard cost: 175sp. Level 9 item. Vambraces: Work Organic (6), Armor II (9). Days: 15. Standard cost: 175sp. Level 9 item. Body armor: Work Organic (6), General II (10 x 2 for all specializations), Armor III (14), General II (10). Days: 50. Standard cost: 855sp. Level 14 item. Set: Work Organic True (20), Spell Adder III (14 x 1/2 for single profession x 2 wearable). Days: 34. Standard cost: 748sp. Level 20 item. Total Cost: 175 + 175 + 855 + 748 + (25 sp for the armor) = 1,978sp. Level 20 item.

name: Bracers of Gorgax
description: These rigid leather (medium) vambraces are a +2 spell adder for Clerics and provide a +10 bonus to SCRs when casting spells from the Repulsions list.
recipe: Work Mundane Leather (3), Spell Adder II (9 x 1/2 for single profession x 2 for wearable), Casting Focus II (7 x 1/10 for single list x 2 for wearable). Days: 14. Standard cost: 164sp. Level 9 item.

name: Breastplate of Channeling
description: This body armor (AT 10) of high steel has been enchanted to provide a +15 DB, and it further provides a +15 bonus to both the Channeling and Transcendence skills.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (14), General III (15), General III (15), Armor III (14). Days: 48. Standard cost: 984sp. Level 15 item.

name: Breastplate of Thonian
description: This +10 superior bronze breastplate is decorated with symbols of law and order. It negates fully 50% of torso criticals inflicted on the wearer. It also allows its wearer to cast Fly II (Lofty Bridge) and Reverse Spell I (Spell Reins) each once per day, at a 60th level of effect. It fits any Medium humanoid.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Augmented Casting (11), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), Crit Negation X (60), Reverse Spell I (10), Embed X (19), Daily X (25), Fly II (7), Embed VII (15), Daily VII (18), Armor II (9). Days: 194. Standard cost: 12,864sp. Level 60 item.

name: Channeling Shield
description: This normal shield is of oak, bound with Low Steel (46sp) and enchanted to +10 Shield skill. It gives its bearer a +15 bonus to the Channeling skill.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Armor II (9), General III (15). Days: 26. Standard cost: 488sp. Level 15 item.

name: Circlet of Mentalism
description: This silver circlet (60 sp) is worn on the head, where it protects as a light helm and serves as a x1.25 PP Multiplier for Mentalism. It provides a +10 bonus to RRs against Mentalism as well.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Power Multiplier I (6 x 2 wearable), General II (10), Increase Armor Type (4). Days: 31. Standard cost: 432sp. Level 10 item.

name: Crushing Shield
description: This full shield of superior bronze (with leather grip and straps) bears the image of a clenched fist. It has a +10 Shield skill bonus, and when used for a shield bash, the Size of the shield bash attack is increased by one.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Increased Size (30), Armor II (9). Days: 41. Standard cost: 1,400sp. Level 30 item.

name: Darkling Leather
description: Intended to be the ultimate stealth armor, this leather jerkin (AT 6) grants a +30 bonus to Stalking, but due to a spell failure, this bonus only applies if the wearer is already getting a bonus to his maneuver due to poor lighting.
recipe: Work Mundane Leather (3), General VI (75). Days: 78. Standard cost: 6,089sp. Due to the limitation of the effect, the price drops to 5,480 sp. (It is not all that bad a limitation, as you want to sneak around in the dark anyway.) Level 75 item.211 Dragonskin Armor, AT 5 (+10 DB): This is a full armor suit for a Medium wearer made from some suitable draconian being’s hide and enchanted to provide a +10 bonus to the wearer’s DB, in addition to the normal benefits of the material from which it is made (see Section 3.2). Work Organic True (20), Armor II (9). Days: 29. Standard cost: 1,074sp. Level 20 item. Dragonskin Armor, AT 7 (+15 DB): This is a full armor suit for a Medium wearer made from some suitable draconian being’s hide and enchanted to provide a +15 bonus to the wearer’s DB, in addition to the normal benefits of the material from which it is made (see Section 3.2). Work Organic True (20), Armor III (14). Days: 34. Standard cost: 1,187sp. Level 20 item. Dragonskin Armor, AT 8 (+15 DB): This is a full armor suit for a Medium wearer made from some suitable draconian being’s hide and enchanted to provide a +15 bonus to the wearer’s DB, in addition to the normal benefits of the material from which it is made (see Section 3.2). Work Organic True (20), Armor III (14). Days: 34. Standard cost: 1,208sp. Level 20 item. Dragonskin Armor, AT 9 (+20 DB): This is a full armor suit for a Medium wearer made from some suitable draconian being’s hide and enchanted to provide a +20 bonus to the wearer’s DB, in addition to the normal benefits of the material from which it is made (see Section 3.2). Work Organic True (20), Armor IV (25). Days: 45. Standard cost: 1,715sp. Level 25 item.

name: Death Crown
description: This is a crown of bright silver with black gems, which would be worth 1000 sp as jewelry alone. It is a x2 Essence PP Multiplier, as well as acting as a +7 Spell Adder for the Necromancy Mastery list and as a +7 Spell Adder for the Necromantic Ways list. Furthermore, the (attuned) wearer may cast Army of the Dead True once per month.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Army of the Dead True (40), Embed True (50), Daily X (25), Power Multiplier IV (25 x 2 wearable), Spell Adder VII (40 x 1/10 for single list x 2 wearable), Spell Adder VII (40 x 1/10 for single list x 2 wearable). Days: 189. Standard cost: 11,584sp. Level 50 item.

name: Elven Mail
description: This is a quality full set of mail armor (AT 8) typically worn by elven soldiers of moderate status. This includes a mail shirt with full sleeves, mail leggings, and a mail coif protecting the head. Each component (the sleeves being enchanted separately) is enchanted to reduce maneuver penalties by 10, so the total maneuver bonus is -40, while the armor is made from Elven High Steel (+10 DB), reducing the weight to 13% of the wearer’s own weight (40% lighter than ordinary AT 8).
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Armor II (9). Days: 9. Standard cost: 99sp coif + 99sp sleeves + 99sp greaves + 99sp torso - 360sp base armor = 756sp total. Level 9 item.

name: Elven Splinted Leather
description: This armor is a special Elven design, providing protection equivalent to laminar armor (AT 5) by reinforcing regular leather with hardwood pieces. A standard set includes vambraces and greaves. It functions as normal AT 5, except that it provides a non-magic bonus of +10 to Stalking in vegetation due to design. For this reason, the price of the base item is increased by 100sp. To this has been added an enchantment to provide +10 DB.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Armor II (9). Days: 15. Standard cost: 301sp. Level 9 item.

name: Forester’s Helm
description: This leather (light) helmet provides a +10 bonus to Tracking maneuvers when worn, as well as providing the ability to cast Hues (Nature’s Guises list) three times per day.
recipe: Work Mundane Leather (3), Hues (1), Embed I (3), Daily III (11), General II (10). Days: 28. Standard cost: 367sp. Level 11 item. Dragonskin Armor

name: Gauntlets of Regal Adora
description: These gauntlets of basilisk hide (25sp, 90 Str) allow the wearer to make Unarmed: Strikes attacks as if one Size larger and also do an additional Heat critical equal in severity to the normal critical. They also act as a x2 PP Multiplier for Monks. The wearer may use Turn Missile (Attack Avoidance) at will and gains a constant Monk’s Strength II (Body Reins) effect.
recipe: Work Organic True (20), Constant X (40), Embed X (20), Monk’s Strength II (8), Constant III (18 x 2 at will), Embed I (3), Turn Missile (1), Increased Size (30), Additional Crit III (19), Power Multiplier IV (25 x 1/2 single profession x 2 worn). Days: 202. Standard cost: 9,519sp. Level 40 item.

name: Helm of Might
description: This high steel heavy helm fits any Medium humanoid head. It provides a +35 bonus to Body Development and a +30 bonus to base hits (Tough talent, Tier VI). It also provides the talent Prodigy: Melee Weapons, Tier V (+25 melee OB).
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), General VII (90), Talent Embedding VI (35), Talent Embedding IV (19). Days: 151. Standard cost: 14,611sp. Level 90 item.

name: Helm of Sense Mastery
description: This medium helm allows its wearer to cast Nightvision once per day, Scent once per day, and Sly Ears twice per day. All spells are from the Senses list and are cast at third level.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Daily VII (18), Embed III (7), List Embedding (2), Sly Ears (1), Nightvision (2), Scent (3). Days: 38. Standard cost: 769sp. Level 18 item.

name: Helm of Sight
description: This visored (heavy) helm of Low Steel provides constant Nightvision and Sidevision when worn.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Nightvision (2, Senses), Embed II (5), Constant III (17), Sidevision (5, Physical Enhancement), Embed V (11), Constant X (35). Days: 77. Standard cost: 3,058sp. Level 35 item.

name: Helm of Stature
description: This is a low steel medium helmet that gives the wearer a +20 bonus to Leadership and a +10 bonus to Influence maneuvers. It does not penalize Perception.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), General IV (30), General II (10 x 2 for all specializations), Armor II (9). Days: 61. Standard cost: 2,062sp. Level 30 item.

name: Helm of Strength
description: If the wearer of this low steel medium helmet, which fits any Small humanoid head, has a Strength stat bonus of less than +10, the helm raises it to +10.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), Fixed Bonus III (13). Days: 23. Standard cost: 387sp. Level 13 item. An equivalent item for a Medium wearer would cost 398sp and otherwise have the same stats.

name: Helm of the Weapon Master
description: This eog medium helm negates 50% of head criticals and provides both a +5 Knack for Melee and a +20 Prodigy (Melee) Tier IV bonus, not cumulative with the wearer’s Knack or Prodigy (Melee) bonus (if any).
recipe: Work Metal VI (50), Crit Negation X (60), Talent Embedding VI (35), Knack (12). Days: 127. Standard cost: 14,264sp. Level 60 item.

name: Helm of Two Faces
description: This black alloy heavy helm is inlaid with jade and silver. A claw-like spike at the top holds a black pearl. Its most distinctive feature, however, is that the back of the helmet exactly matches the front, save that where the eye holes in the visor would be, it is filled in with silver “eyes” and jade “pupils”. Unenchanted, it would be valued at 850sp. When worn, the wearer gains the ability to see around himself in a full circle, as constant Global Vision (Physical Enhancement). He can also see invisible things, as constant See Invisible I (Invisible Ways). Lastly, he gains +20 to Reverse Strike skill.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal IV (15), Constant True (90), Embed XX (30), Global Vision (17), Constant X (35), Embed X (19), See Invisible I (9), General IV (30). Days: 225. Standard cost: 22,900sp. Level 90 item.

name: Helm of Uncleaving
description: This black alloy full (heavy) helm negates 50% of criticals to the wearer’s head. It will fit any Medium-sized head.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal IV (15), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), Crit Negation X (60). Days: 63. Standard cost: 4,647sp. Level 60 item.

name: Mighty Gauntlets
description: These mail gauntlets (1.6 lbs., 10sp, Str 75) add +5 to the wearer’s Strength bonus and are +10 weapons when used for Unarmed: Strikes attacks. Once per day, they provide a Bladeturn I (Shield Mastery).
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Stat Bonus V (50), Daily X (25), Embed VII (15), Bladeturn I (7), Weapon II (8). Days: 110. Standard cost: 5,950sp. Level 50 item.

name: Overlord Shield
description: This is a wall shield of adamant steel (+25 Shield skill) which grants the wielder +20 to Leadership skill and +8 Leadership ranks. Once per day, the wielder may cast Heal True (Surface Ways) on himself.
recipe: Work Metal V (35), Daily XL (75), Hybrid Embedding (2), Embed True (60), Heal True (25), General IV (30), General IV (30). Days: 232. Standard cost: 22,265sp. Level 75 item.

name: Paladin Shield
description: This all-metal normal shield is made of White Alloy and is a gleaming silver in color. It has a +20 Shield skill bonus and is a x2 Power Point Multiplier for Paladins.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal III (12), Power Multiplier IV (25 x 1/2 for single Profession), Armor IV (25). Days: 35. Standard cost: 1,186sp. Level 25 item.

name: Plate Armor of the Dwarves
description: This is a complete suit of plate armor (AT 10) made from zataak and enchanted to +50 DB. Decorated with amber, gold, and topazes, this would easily be worth 50,000 sp unenchanted. While it will fit itself to any Medium humanoid, it is regarded as a sacred relic by the Dwarves, and they will demand it back from any non-Dwarf found with it, while any Dwarf recovering this armor would be greatly honored.
recipe: Work Metal I (11), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), Armor V (50). Days: 69. Standard cost: 59,657sp. Level 50 item.

name: Portal Shield
description: This normal shield with a +10 Shield skill bonus bears the emblem of a gateway. Once per day, the bearer can cast Portal (Lofty Bridge).
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Portal (6), Embed VI (13), Daily VII (18), Armor II (9). Days: 51. Standard cost: 1,077sp. Level 18 item.

name: Red Shield of Diff-Marash
description: This normal shield is ash reinforced with iron and painted a solid red. It has a +10 Shield skill bonus and negates 25% of criticals to the shield arm and 10% of other criticals by attackers against which it is defending. It also casts Deflections I (from the Shield Mastery list) once per day.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Deflections I (5), Embed V (11), Daily V (14), Crit Negation V (20), Armor II (9). Days: 65. Standard cost: 1,501sp. Level 20 item.

name: Rhino Armor
description: This armor is a full suit of AT 5, made from rhinoceros hide (valued at 50 sp for exotic hide). The horn is placed on the wearer’s forehead and may be used to make a (Medium) Horn attack. The wearer benefits from a +10 DB enchantment and the wearer’s movement penalties (to OB or maneuver) due to pace are reduced by 10 when charging. It will fit any Medium humanoid.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Consecration (2), Automatic Sizing Organic (6), Armor II (9), Sacred Protections II (9), Talent Embedding I (6). Days: 38. Standard cost: 468sp. Level 9 item.

name: Robe of Protection
description: These fine robes are light clothing, but provide protection as AT 4 with a +10 DB and a constant Protection I (Spell Wall) effect on the wearer.
recipe: Work Weave III (12), Armoring Cloth III (13), Armor II (9), Constant III (17), Embed I (3), Protection I (1). Days: 55. Standard cost: 1,102sp. Level 17 item.

name: Robes of Illusion
description: These blue robes are AT 1, but do provide a +10 DB and are a +1 Spell Adder for Illusionists.
recipe: Work Mundane Cloth (2), Armor II (9), Spell Adder I (5 x 1/2 single profession). Days: 14. Standard cost: 156sp. Level 9 item.

name: Rune Shield
description: This normal shield (constructed of hickory and high steel) granting +10 Shield skill may have its back side (conveniently facing the bearer) act as a sheet of rune paper.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Organic Rune (12), Make Rune Paper (5). Days: 16. Standard cost: 330sp. Level 12 item.

name: Shield of Arn
description: This normal shield is of a simple appearance, but grants a +10 bonus to Shield skill and it also grants its bearer a +10 bonus to RRs against all magic.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Armor II (9), General II (10) x 3. Days: 45. Standard cost: 591sp. Level 10 item.

name: Shield of Camouflage
description: The bearer of this full shield is affected by a constant Hues (Nature’s Guises) effect. It also provides a +10 bonus to Shield skill and +10 to Stalking.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Hues (1), Embed I (3), Constant III (18), General II (10), Armor II (9). Days: 47. Standard cost: 994sp. Level 18 item.

name: Shield of Death
description: This full shield is shaped and painted to resemble an oversized human skull. It is of low steel construction with a bone handgrip. It grants +15 to Shield skill. Five times per day, the bearer can cast Major Pain (Mind Destruction). It also serves as a +2 spell adder for any Evil spellcaster.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Major Pain (7), Embed VII (17), Daily XL (75), Hybrid Embedding (2), Spell Adder II (10), Armor III (14). Days: 127. Standard cost: 10,207sp. Level 75 item.

name: Shield of Flows
description: This hickory full shield is effectively weightless due to a constant Staying III (Telekinesis) set to oppose gravity. In liquids, it will support its bearer, lightening him by up to 380 pounds, allowing even a heavy man to float like a cork. This is achieved through a Staying True (Telekinesis) spell triggered by immersion. It also grants +10 Shield skill and, once per day, the bearer can Command Current (Water Law), using the shield as his “boat” if desired.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Constant XX (90 x 2 triggered), Embed XX (35), Staying True (19), Daily XX (40), Embed XX (30), Command Current (17), Constant X (40), Embed IV (12), Staying III (4). Days: 373. Standard cost: 37,780sp. Level 90 item.

name: Shield of the Gate
description: This vaal full shield allows the bearer to cast Demonic Gate III (Summons) once each day, in addition to granting +20 to the bearer’s Shield skill.
recipe: Work Organic True (20), Demonic Gate III (20), Embed XX (35), Daily XX (50). Days: 105. Standard cost: 6,382sp. Level 50 item.

name: Shield of the Green Woods
description: This is a normal shield made of oak (+5 Shield skill), and it allows its bearer to cast Hues (Nature’s Protection) once per day. If damaged, it will grow back to full strength the next round, due to a constant Repair (Earth Law) effect.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Constant X (35), Embed VI (13), Repair (6), Daily III (11), Embed III (8), Hues (3). Days: 77. Standard cost: 3,049sp. Level 35 item.

name: Shield of Troll Skin
description: This wall shield of +10 hardened troll hide has been enchanted to +20, and its bearer also gains the natural (unencumbering) armor of a troll (AT 4). There is no knowing how a troll will react to this shield. Some find it highly offensive, while others think it is rather clever and possibly even funny.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Talent Embedding III (14), Armor IV (25). Days: 35. Standard cost: 1,089sp. Level 25 item.

name: Shield/Rod
description: This curious device has three forms: the first is a 4' long High Steel rod of 1" diameter (5sp), the second is a 10' pole of vaal wood (3" diameter, 39sp), and the third is a +15 wall shield of leather, ash, and iron.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9). Days: 9. Standard cost: 160sp. Level 9 item. Pole: Work Wood (18). Days: 9. Standard cost: 819sp. Level 18 item. Shield: Work Organic (6), Armor III (14), Multiform III (7). Days: 27. Standard cost: 441sp. Level 14 item. The combined set will take 45 work days, but more than one form could be crafted at once so it might not require 45 calendar days. The total standard cost is 1,420sp, and the combined form is a Level 18 item.

name: Tunic of Essence
description: This linen tunic is a x2 PP Multiplier for Essence. It provides a +15 bonus to RRs against Essence, protects as AT 3 (covering chest, groin, and legs), and provides +10 DB. It fits perfectly on any Medium humanoid.
recipe: Work Weave III (12), Automatic Sizing Organic (6), Power Multiplier IV (25 x 2 wearable), General III (15), Armor II (9), Armoring Cloth II (8). Days: 100. Standard cost: 2,900sp. Level 25 item.

name: Vambraces of Power
description: Made of Low Steel, with straps of red leather, these medium vambraces negate 25% of arm criticals and cast Monk’s Strength II (off the Body Reins list) once per day.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Crit Negation V (20), Monk’s Strength II (8), Embed X (20), Daily X (25). Days: 75. Standard cost: 2,225sp. Level 25 item.

name: Vanishing Shield
description: This full shield can become invisible once per day. It is useful for bringing a shield into a place without being obvious that you are planning to fight. It also has a +10 bonus.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Armor II (9), Unseen I (2), Embed II (5), Daily III (10). Days: 32. Standard cost: 391sp. Level 10 item.

name: Amulet of Arnd
description: This simple silver necklace with a shield-shaped pendant (80 sp value) provides a constant Blur (Shield Mastery) effect on the wearer.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Constant III (17), Embed III (7), Blur (3). Days: 32. Standard cost: 688sp. Level 17 item.

name: Amulet of Beastform
description: An Amulet of Beastform is a silver figurine of an animal, usually kept on a silver chain and worn as a necklace (200 sp). The wearer can transform at will into the depicted animal, though his possessions (other than the necklace) will not transform. These are not the work of any mortal alchemy, being gifts from the beast-gods to their mortal servants long ago. Two values are calculated, the value depending on whether or not the animal into which the wearer may transform is dangerous or not.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Lesser Transformation (30 x 2). Days: 65. Standard cost: 2,345sp. Level 30 item. Work Lesser Metals (5), Transformation (40 x 2). Days: 85. Standard cost: 3,940sp. Level 40 item.

name: Amulet of Warding
description: This silver religious symbol on a silver chain (95 sp) allows casting Repel Undead IX (Repulsions) at will and provides a +15 bonus to SCRs when casting spells from the Repulsions list.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Constant X (40 x 2 at will), Embed VII (17), Repel Undead IX (6), Casting Focus III (11 x 1/10 for single list x 2 wearable). Days: 110. Standard cost: 4,935sp. Level 40 item.

name: Choker of Azrak
description: This bejeweled gold choker has a jewelry value of 300 sp. It is “indestructible”, negates 50% of head criticals, and is a universal x3 PP Multiplier.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Power Multiplier VI (75 x 3 universal x 2 wearable), Unbreakable Work (90), Crit Negation X (60). Days: 608. Standard cost: 65,356sp. Level 90 item.

name: Choker of Whispers
description: This is a coral bead choker set with a large topaz (value: 310 sp). Both coral and stone are pink. It is a +2 Spell Adder for Bards, and it allows the use of Long Whisper I (Sound Projection) five times per day.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Daily V (14), Embed I (3), Long Whisper I (1), Spell Adder II (9 x 1/2 for single profession x 2 for wearable). Days: 35. Standard cost: 695sp. Level 9 item. Amulet of Warding

name: Dog-ring
description: This is a silver ring which will fit any Small or Medium finger. Crushed sapphires appear in the design of four paw-prints (ring value: 175 sp). The wearer gains a +20 bonus to Animal Handling: Canines, as well as the sensory gifts of a dog (the talents Hearing: Dog, Acute Smell V, and Prodigy: Tracking +15).
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Multisize (12), Talent Embedding IV (19), General IV (30), Talent Embedding III (14), Talent Embedding III (14). Days: 97. Standard cost: 3,473sp. Level 30 item.

name: Marlor’s Crown
description: A silver crown set with diamonds, rubies, and aquamarines, this object would be worth 12,500 sp even without enchantment. It provides a constant True Aura (Brilliance) to its wearer, and it allows the wearer to cast Monk’s Strength II (Body Reins) and Haste II (Rapid Ways) on a daily basis. It provides a +35 bonus to Body Development and grants Tier IV Prodigy: Body Development talent, for a total +55 bonus for most wearers.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Daily XX (50), Embed XX (35), Haste II (15), General VII (90), Constant X (40), Embed X (20), True Aura (8), Daily X (25), Embed X (20), Monk’s Strength II (8), Talent Embedding VI (35). Days: 354. Standard cost: 47,900sp. Level 90 item.

name: Medallion of the Myrmidon
description: This is a gold medallion depicting an armored warrior (250 sp), with a loop through which a ribbon or chain may be put in order to wear it. When worn around the neck, it provides a +20 to Maneuvering in Armor skill and raises the wearer’s Strength bonus to +15 if it is lower.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General IV (30), Fixed Bonus IV (20). Days: 55. Standard cost: 2,065sp. Level 30 item.

name: Mentalists’ Crown
description: This silver diadem (400 sp) is a +1 Mentalism spell adder that provides a constant Aura (Brilliance list) when worn by a user of the Realm of Mentalism.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Aura (4), Embed IV (12), Constant X (40), Spell Adder I (5 x 2 wearable). Days: 71. Standard cost: 3,453sp. Limitation to Mentalism users will restrict utility so that it may be harder to find a buyer, but is not a real limitation for the right user (and the restriction is broad enough such folk are common). It also has a secondary utility as an identifier of Mentalism users, which balances the restriction out as well. Level 40 item.

name: Necklace of Vanity
description: These necklaces are made in whatever current style suits the intended wearer, though their charms can keep them popular long after styles change, for this necklace not only adorns the wearer, it enhances the wearer’s own appearance. They will be quality jewelry or better.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Beautify (2, Living Change), Embed II (5), Constant III (17). Days: 32. Standard cost: 608sp plus the value of the necklace as jewelry. Level 17 item.

name: Opal Necklace
description: This large (90 carat) black opal (2550 sp) is set in a gold necklace, adding another 1200 sp value. Only the opal is enchanted, but it offers considerable power. It is a universal +4 Spell Adder and provides a constant Aura (Light’s Way) on the wearer. Once each day, the wearer may invoke a Lightning Bolt I (Light Law) and an Illusions III (Lesser Illusions).
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Spell Adder IV (19 x 2 wearable x 3 universal), Daily X (25), Embed X (19), Lightning Bolt I (10), Daily X (25), Embed X (19) Illusions III (8), Constant III (18), Embed III (8), Aura (3). Days: 257. Standard cost: 12,231sp. Level 25 item.

name: Pendant of Potency
description: This silver necklace bears a golden talon holding a large white pearl (1,250 sp total value). It is a +5 Spell Adder and a x1.75 PP multiplier, and it increases the casting level of all spells by five.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Spell Adder V (30 x 3 universal x 2 wearable), Power Multiplier III (17 x 3 universal x 2 wearable), Increase Power (16 x 3 universal x 2 wearable). Days: 386. Standard cost: 17,076sp. Level 30 item.

name: Ring of Endless Shock Bolts
description: This silver ring (5 sp) will fit to any Medium-sized hand, but otherwise has but a single power: the (attuned) wearer may throw a Shock Bolt every round.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Constant III (17, doubled for “at will” power), Embed II (5), Shock Bolt I (2), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8). Days: 54. Standard cost: 1,085sp. Level 17 item.

name: Ring of Fire Bolts
description: This is a silver ring with a red Jasper stone (45 sp). It allows the wearer to cast a Fire Bolt I (Fire Law) once per day.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8), Daily VII (18), Embed VI (13), Fire Bolt I (6). Days: 45. Standard cost: 990sp. Level 18 item.

name: Ring of Invisibility
description: This is a copper ring (0.1 sp value) enchanted with a constant Invisibility I (Invisible Ways) effect. If the invisibility is negated for any reason, the wearer will remain visible for the entirety of the next round, then become invisible again on his initiative on the round after that.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Constant X (35), Embed IV (9), Invisibility I (4). Days: 53. Standard cost: 2,014sp. Level 35 item.

name: Ring of Kaylaikas
description: This adamantese ring is adorned with a 30 carat colorless diamond (total value 6000 sp). It is a x3 universal PP Multiplier and grants constant Nightvision, Sly Ears (Senses), and Fly II (Lofty Bridge) when worn. Finally, it negates 40% of spell failure results by the wearer.
recipe: Work Metal I (11), Power Multiplier VI (75 x 3 universal x 2 wearable), Constant X (35), Embed VII (15), Fly II (7), Spell Discipline IV (30), Constant III (17), Embed II (5), Nightvision (2), Constant III (17), Embed I (3), Sly Ears (1). Days: 593. Standard cost: 59,963sp. Level 75 item.

name: Ring of Lammoth
description: The wearer of this silver ring set with an emerald (85 sp) is under the effect of a constant Cancel Essence (Spell Wall), Cancel Channeling (Spell Defense), and Cancel Mentalism (Spell Resistance) without the need to concentrate.
recipe: Work Inorganic (13), Cancel Channeling (2), Embed II (6), Constant III (19), Maintain Spell (4), Cancel Mentalism (2), Embed II (6), Constant III (19), Maintain Spell (4), Cancel Essence (2), Embed II (5), Constant III (17), Maintain Spell (4). Days: 103. Standard cost: 2,454sp. Level 19 item.

name: Ring of Long Spells
description: This plain gold ring (40 sp) doubles the duration of all spells cast by the wearer (unless otherwise extended). It will fit any Medium-sized hand.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Automatic Sizing Inorganic (8), Extension II (2, Spell Enhancement), Embed II (5), Constant III (17). Days: 37. Standard cost: 743sp. Level 17 item.

name: Ring of Medicine
description: This ring takes the form of a golden serpent with its tail in its mouth (90 sp). It provides a +25 skill bonus for Medicine.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General V (60). Days: 65. Standard cost: 4,185sp. Level 60 item.

name: Ring of Sculpting
description: The wearer of this bronze ring (1 sp) gains a +15 bonus to Stonecraft.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General III (15). Days: 20. Standard cost: 341sp. Level 15 item.

name: Ring of Swimming
description: This copper ring (0.1 sp) provides a +15 bonus to Swimming skill. It can provide Waterlungs (Physical Enhancement) once per day.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General III (15), Daily X (25), Embed X (19), Waterlungs (8). Days: 72. Standard cost: 2,016sp. Level 25 item.

name: Ring of the Lady
description: This silver ring (8 sp) provides a +30 bonus to Trickery.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General VI (75). Days: 80. Standard cost: 6,328sp. Level 75 item.

name: Ruby Ring
description: This ring of gold is set with a ruby (220 sp) and acts as a +1 Spell Adder for anyone.
recipe: Work Inorganic (13), Spell Adder I (5 x 3 for universal x 2 for wearable). Days: 43. Standard cost: 908sp. Level 13 item.

name: Shaman’s Mask
description: This ironwood mask weighs three pounds and is valued at 12 sp as an art object, and is enchanted with both Sanctifier and Adept enchantments. It is a x1.5 PP Multiplier for Druids and a +3 Spell Adder for spells dealing with animals. It provides the wearer with a +20 bonus to Animal Handling maneuvers.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Consecration (2), General IV (30 x 2 for all specializations), Sacred Adder III (11), Power Multiplier II (12 x 1/2 for single profession x 2 wearable). Days: 89. Standard cost: 3,038sp. Level 30 item.

name: Thiru’s Ring of Shouting
description: The wearer of this simple loop of green glass (0.05 sp) may raise his voice (by concentrating) to carry up to a mile away without loss of volume. He may also use its power to cast Sudden Sound (Sound Control) four times per day by shouting.
recipe: Work Inorganic (13), Sounding True (14, Sound Projection), Embed XX (30), Constant True (90), Sudden Sound (7), Embed VII (15), Daily XXX (60). Days: 229. Standard cost: 22,213sp. Level 90 item.

name: Tracker’s Ring
description: A silver ring (6 sp value) engraved with various foot and paw prints, this item is a x1.5 PP multiplier for Rangers, provides a +20 bonus to Tracking maneuvers, and allows the casting of Path Tale (Pathmastery) once per day.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General IV (30), Daily IV (13), Embed IV (12), Path Tale (4), Power Multiplier II (12 x 1/2 for single profession x 2 wearable). Days: 76. Standard cost: 2,514sp. Level 30 item.

name: Abrol, the Elf-Drinker
description: This broadsword of Inferior Bronze appears worn and tarnished when first found, and has the expected +0 OB bonus. However, once it slays an Elf, the corrosion will drop away and the blade gleam as if newly forged. If it should go a year without slaying an Elf, the tarnished look will return. When it slays an Elf, it feeds off the soul, and for each level of the slain Elf, the wielder may heal a concussion hit, a -1 of breakage penalty may be removed from the blade, or the wielder may recover 1 PP. Furthermore, for every level of the Elf slain, Abrol gains +1 to its OB, up to a maximum of +25. This bonus fades at a loss of +1 for each day that passes since Abrol has killed an Elf. A rare combination of extreme serendipity (extra OB when serial-killing Elves) and a flaw (it only feeds on Elvish souls), Abrol is notorious among (7), Weapon III (13), Additional Crit III (19), Fire Ball (8), Embed X (19), Daily X (25). Days: 86. Standard cost: 2,544sp. Level 25 item.

name: Blade of Crevice-fighting
description: This high steel (+10) epee has a grip of blue cloth. In confined spaces, it will vary its length in response to the wielder’s desires, granting a +30 bonus to Restricted Quarters skill with this weapon.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), General VI (75). Days: 74. Standard cost: 5,962sp. Level 75 item.

name: Blade of Flame
description: This blade is of Low Steel, with a grip made from the skin of a desert snake. It comes in two versions: the Lesser and the Greater Blade of Flame. The Lesser Blade is a +10 weapon that does an extra Heat crit of one less severity than the normal critical and casts Fire Bolt I once a day. The Greater Blade is a +15 weapon doing an extra Heat crit equal in severity to the normal critical and casting Fire Ball once per day. Both have flames running along the blade when drawn. Any sword type may be found with this enchantment, and the listed price (based on a 10sp weapon) is appropriate for a broadsword, scimitar, or falchion.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Weapon II (8), Additional Crit II (14), Fire Bolt I (6), Embed VI (13), Daily VII (18). Days: 61. Standard cost: 1,331sp. Level 18 item. Greater: Work Mundane Metal I

name: Blade of Frost
description: This blade is of Low Steel, with a grip made of furry snow hare hide. It comes in two versions: the Lesser and the Greater Blade of Frost. The Lesser Blade is a +10 weapon that does an extra Cold crit of one less severity than the normal critical and casts Ice Bolt I once a day. The Greater Blade is a +15 weapon doing an extra Cold crit equal in severity to the normal critical and casting Cold Ball II once per day. Both have frost spreading across the blade when drawn. Any sword type may be found with this enchantment, and the listed price (based on a 10sp weapon) is appropriate for a broadsword, scimitar, or falchion.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Weapon II (8), Additional Crit II (14), Ice Bolt I (6), Embed VI (13), Daily VII (18). Days: 61. Standard cost: 1,331sp. Level 18 item. Greater: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Weapon III (13), Additional Crit III (19), Cold Ball II (7), Embed VII (15), Daily VII (18). Days: 74. Standard cost: 1,604sp. Level 18 item.

name: Blade of Warning
description: These high steel (+10) blades have an extra +5 OB against any creature of darkness and an extra +10 OB against orcs and trolls (these bonuses are cumulative with the base +10 but not with each other). The blade will glow when “evil” is within 100'. This enchantment is normally found on an arming sword, a broadsword, a dagger, a falchion, a longsword, or a short sword. The listed price is for a broadsword, scimitar, or falchion.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Consecration (2), Detection (21 x 2 broad category), Weapon II (8), Blessed Weapon I (5), Weapon II (8 x 1/2 Variety). Days: 60. Standard cost: 1,550sp. Level 21 item.

name: Bonebane
description: This iron-headed mace is a +10 weapon, but the power for which it is named is the delivery of a Break Limb (Flesh Destruction list) spell with every critical inflicted.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Constant X (40 x 2 for triggered effect), Embed V (14), Hybrid Embedding (2), Break Limb (5), Weapon II (8). Days: 114. Standard cost: 5,022sp. Level 40 item.

name: Claw Hand Gloves
description: Commonly found in Small or Medium sizes, these gloves (15 sp base value) have long been favored by scouts, bandits, assassins, and spies who wish to make their kills look like animal attacks. They may be used as Unarmed: Strikes weapons, or they may be used to make an Unarmed: Claw attack (at the wearer’s Size). In either case, they grant +10 OB and an additional Slash critical one severity less than the primary critical.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Additional Crit II (14), Weapon II (8), Talent Embedding I (6). Days: 34. Standard cost: 559sp. Level 14 item.

name: Crossbow Wand
description: Misnamed by explorers who first encountered them, the name stuck as these magical blowpipes were exported. They have an increased range (+25' range increment), and their darts strike as if a Size larger. They have been produced for both Small and Medium users.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Increased Size (30), Range Improvement II (11). Days: 45. Standard cost: 1,485sp. Level 30 item.

name: Crowga’s Quarterstaff
description: This oak (+5) quarterstaff will cast a spell on any target it strikes when wielded by a Sorcerer. If the crit is on a limb, a Break Limb (Flesh Destruction) spell is cast, otherwise a Touch of Disruption (Flesh Destruction) is cast.
recipe: Work Mundane Wood (4), Consecration (2), Constant X (40 x 2 for trigger), Hybrid Embedding (2), Embed V (14), Break Limb (5), Chosen Kind (3), Constant III (18 x 2 for trigger), Hybrid Embedding (2), Embed III (8), Touch of Disruption (3), Chosen Kind (3). Days: 162. Standard cost: 7,262sp. Level 40 item. Note that since it is only of value to a Sorcerer who fights with a staff, finding a buyer may be quite difficult. Work Mundane Metal II (9), Weapon V (50), Increased Size (30), Range Improvement III (17). Days: 96. Standard cost: 5,584sp. Level 50 item.

name: Crystal Knife
description: This unique dagger has a blade made of a slender rock crystal that glistens with rainbow colors, but has the strength of steel (+10 Strength for breakage checks). The gripping end is wrapped in elephant leather as a simple handle. It is a +10 weapon and a +3 Spell Adder for non-Evil Channeling. It provides a +20 bonus to DB against Directed Spells. It is said to be a gift from a god of earth and stone, made from one of his own teeth. Because of its unique nature and attractive blade, this item is estimated at 200 sp unenchanted.
recipe: Work Stone (10), Consecration (2), Spell Adder III (14), Sacred Protections IV (14), Sacred Weapon II (7). Days: 47. Standard cost: 999sp. Level 14 item.

name: Dagger of Assassination
description: This iron dagger has a pommel in the shape of a skull and the grip is wrapped in black linen. The metal itself has been stained black, almost eliminating the gleam of the metal. When this +10 weapon is drawn, its wielder gains a +10 bonus to Stalking, a +10 bonus to Ambush: Melee Weapons, and most notably, an extra 10 ranks of Ambush: Melee Weapons.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General V (60), General II (10), General II (10), Weapon II (8). Days: 93. Standard cost: 5,955sp. Level 60 item.

name: Darts of Staying
description: These darts have a single-use enchantment. Upon first delivering a critical, one of these darts will also deliver a Hold True (Spirit Mastery) spell to the target.
recipe: Work Organic (6), Embed XX (30), Hold True (14). Days: 55. The total PP requirement for a batch of five darts is 74, resulting in a standard price of 33sp per day, or 1,815sp for the batch. The standard price per dart is thus 363sp. Level 30 item.

name: Demonslayer
description: This high steel arming sword is enchanted to +20, with an additional +15 against all beings of darkness. It is a Holy Weapon, and against Extra Planar Creatures it is Slaying II and does an additional Cold critical of equal severity to the normal critical. Holy Weapons strike as if one Size larger when used against Evil entities, do an additional Holy critical two severities less than the regular critical, inflict a B Holy critical of the creature’s size on Evil creatures directly touching them, and are Slaying I against demons and undead of a larger size than the wielder (this is cumulative with this weapon’s Slaying II effect against extra-planar creatures if both apply).
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9) Consecration (2), Slaying II (20 x 5 Category), Holy Weapon (25), Additional Crit III (19), Blessed Weapon III (16), Weapon IV (25). Days: 126. Standard cost: 3,898sp. Level 25 item.

name: Dermik Dral’s Omba
description: This curious throwing weapon is shaped like a cross, combining four hand axe blades at a total weight of 3 pounds (Str 80, 20 sp). This has been enchanted to a +20 OB and it strikes on the battle axe table at +1 Size. It possesses a 20' range increment as a thrown weapon, and is unsuitable for melee (treat as an Exotic weapon with poor design canceling out the magic OB bonus to +0 and a fumble number of 15 if someone insists on trying).
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Increased Size True (90), Weapon IV (25), Range Improvement III (17). Days: 137. Standard cost: 13,035sp. Level 90 item.

name: Dragonslayer
description: This low steel (+5) long spear gains an additional +20 OB (+25 total) and is Slaying II against Great Drakes.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Slaying II (20 x 3 Type), Weapon IV (25). Days: 87. Standard cost: 2,564sp. Level 25 item.

name: Fang of the Long Sleep
description: This long bow arrow is tipped with eog (+30 OB) and has a vaal shaft. It is enchanted to strike as if it were one Size greater. The strength of the arrow (for breakage purposes) is 110, based on the vaal shaft and the enchantment, so it will normally be reusable if it can be recovered.
recipe: Work Metal VI (50), Increased Size (30). Days: 50. Standard cost: 8,700sp. Level 50 item.

name: Flail of Fire and Ice
description: This mighty +10 heavy flail has two heads. Both are of iron and on iron chains, one of which is darkened as if smudged with smoke, while the other shows a smattering of rust. In combat, the first head bursts into blue fire, while the second grows a covering of ice. Anyone struck takes both an extra Heat and an extra Cold critical of equal severity to the normal critical. On the hickory haft of the weapon is the inscription, “In diversity, strength.”
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Additional Crit III (19), Additional Crit III (19), Weapon II (8). Days: 51. Standard cost: 1,141sp. Level 19 item.

name: Great Axe of the Dwarves
description: This is a long axe of Dwarven white alloy steel (+15) with an ironwood haft. It is enchanted to +20, and it gains an additional +5 when wielded by a Dwarf and an additional +10 when used against an Orc. It increases the wielder’s Constitution bonus by 3. Due to the materials and enchantment, it has a strength (for breakage purposes) of 130.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal III (12), Stat Bonus III (25), Weapon IV (25), Weapon II (8 x 1/2 Variety), Racial Weapon (3). Days: 54. Standard cost: 1,929sp. Level 25 item.

name: Great Elven Blade
description: This is a +20 high steel longsword with a grip of silk. It is a Lesser Holy Weapon that provides a +10 RR bonus against Evil spells, as well as constant Resist Heat and Resist Cold (Elemental Shields). The wielder may Detect Undead (Holy War) at will. Lesser Holy Weapons strike as if one Size larger when used against Evil entities, and inflict an A Holy critical of the creature’s size on Evil creatures directly touching them.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Consecration (2), Constant III (18 x 2 at will), Embed I (3), Detect Undead (1), Constant III (17), Embed III (7), Resist Cold (3), Constant III (17), Embed II (5), Resist Heat (2), Lesser Holy Weapon (18), Weapon IV (25), Sacred Protections II (9). Days: 144. Standard cost: 4,442sp. Level 25 item.

name: Great Falchion of the Yreck
description: This starfall (+15) great falchion is Slaying I and +25 against Elves.
recipe: Work Metal III (19), Slaying I (15), Weapon II (8 x 1/2 Variety). Days: 23. Standard cost: 908sp. Level 19 item.

name: Great Mace of Tung
description: A great mace of adamant steel with a vaal haft, this weapon has a +25 OB, attacks at increased Size, and does an additional Unbalancing critical at one severity less than the normal critical. It also allows the casting of Light I (Luminous Elements) once per day.
recipe: Work Metal V (35), Increased Size (30), Daily V (14), Embed IV (9), Light I (4), Additional Crit II (14). Days: 81. Standard cost: 6,171sp. Level 35 item.

name: Great Sword of Vrak Tanuk
description: This longsword is lighter than expected (3.6 pounds), due to its construction from Elven High Steel. The grip is of mastodon ivory, carven with the images of peculiar birds, increasing the price of the base weapon from 322sp (for an Elven High Steel longsword) to 400sp. It is a +25 weapon with increased Size, attacking on the Arming Sword table as a Large attack. It can be thrown with a range increment of 20'.223 when held and adds four to ranks of Ambush when modifying a crit through successful Ambush.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), General II (10), Weapon II (8), General I (6). Days: 29. Standard cost: 351sp. Level 10 item.

name: Hammer of Frost
description: This +15 war hammer also acts as a magical staff of Cold Ball II (Ice Law).
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Metallic Wand (6), Size Reduction Inorganic (16), Make Staff (14), Cold Ball II (7), Embed VII (15), Weapon III (13). Days: 76. Standard cost: 1,459sp. Level 16 item.

name: Hammer of the Hills
description: This war hammer has a hickory haft and a head of High Steel. It is a +10 weapon against most foes, but a +25 weapon against Goblinoids.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal II (9), Weapon III (13). Days: 12. Standard cost: 295sp. Level 13 item.

name: Holy Morning Star
description: This spiked light flail is a +10 Holy Weapon with a constant Smite Undead II (Holy War) effect. Holy Weapons strike as if one Size larger when used against Evil entities, do an additional Holy critical two severities less than the regular critical, inflict a B Holy critical of the creature’s size on Evil creatures directly touching them, and are Slaying I against demons and undead of a larger size than the wielder.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Consecration (2), Constant X (40), Embed VII (17), Smite Undead II (7), Holy Weapon (25), Weapon II (8). Days: 104. Standard cost: 4,583sp. Level 40 item.

name: Irgaak Stone
description: This is a blue quartz crystal (sapphire quartz) of around 80 carats and valued at 7.5 sp, convenient for inconspicuous carrying, but it has a second form, becoming a +10 low steel claymore that is Slaying III against Giants.
recipe: Work Mundane Gemstone (8). Days: 8. Standard cost: 88sp. Level 8 item. Sword: Work Mundane Metal I (7), Slaying III (40 x 3 for Type), Weapon II (8), Multiform II (3). Days: 133. Standard cost: 6,046sp. Level 40 item. The combined item will take a total of 141 working days to create, although the crystal could be prepared at the same time as the sword to complete the project in 133 calendar days. The total standard cost is 1013sp, and it will be a Level 40 item.

name: Ithalmar, the Fist of Venusa
description: This white alloy light flail has been enchanted to +20. The grip is of human bone, wrapped in horse hide, with metallic reinforcement for strength. The user can cast spells up to 10th level from the Necromancy Mastery and Necromantic Ways list regardless of his Realm.
recipe: Work Mundane Metal III (12), Weapon IV (25), Emplace List X (25), Emplace List X (25), Adaptive Power (7). Days: 79. Standard cost: 2,498sp. Level 25 item.

name: Korin’s Hammer
description: This is a common iron and ash war hammer that does an additional Unbalancing critical of one level severity less than the regular critical. It is a +15 weapon, and it will raise the total Strength bonus of the wielder to +10, if it is otherwise lower.
recipe: Work Lesser Metals (5), Additional Crit II (14), Weapon III (13), Fixed Bonus III (13). Days: 45. Standard cost: 780sp. Level 14 item.

name: Lathe of the Moak
description: This item is most commonly found as a laen dagger with a hilt of adamant steel, enchanted to +30, with its thrown range increment increased by 15', and possessing the ability to return to its thrower via teleportation. It possesses Genius Intelligence and speaks, knowing Elvish and human tongues. It will prefer an Elvish wielder, but will tolerate another who is friendly towards Elves. Its purpose is to protect Elvenkind. It provides its wielder with a constant Monk’s Strength III (Body Reins) effect, tripling hits of damage done and adding another +15 OB. It provides Detect Curse (Lore), Detect Evil (Lore), Detect Channeling (Detection Mastery), Detect Mentalism (Detection), and Detect Essence (Detecting Ways) at will. It can transform into a laen and adamant steel arming sword, long sword, or short sword, keeping its powers in each form (having a 20' range increment when thrown in its non-dagger forms).
